WITN08630100
WITN08630100

18. The Fraud Team was tasked to investigate crime, interview suspects, prepare case files for criminal court and support POL lawyers with prosecutions. It also had a small team of financial investigators who would try and recover assets for the company that were gained from the Proceeds of Crime (using POCA legislation).

19. I cannot recall what the Commercial Security Team did.

20. The Physical Security Team were responsible for implementing physical security controls like CCTV, Alarms across the POL estate. In an effort to detect and deter crime.

21. I cannot recall any major changes to this structure whilst I was there.

22. I do not recall who within the investigation team determined how a criminal investigation would be conducted.

23. I believe the role of the Financial Investigation Unit was to recovering assets via the Proceeds of Crime Act, where someone had been found guilty.

24. I do not recall which other teams within the Post Office were involved in criminal investigations and prosecutions, what their roles were in the process and how the Security team worked with them in this area.

Page 6 of 22
